title: Pacific Prime Dubai Wins Cigna Middle East's Individual Broker of the Year Award for the Third Time
text: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Global insurance brokerage and employee benefits specialist Pacific Prime is proud to win Cigna Middle East's Individual Broker of the Year Award 2022, marking the brokerage's third consecutive year winning the award. The team from Cigna presented the award on February 15th, 2023 at Dubai Creek Golf and Yacht Club's Lake View Restaurant in an outdoor setting.

title: Jeff Auxier's Auxier Asset Management 4th-Quarter and Full-Year 2022 Report
text: Moderating inflation, declining longer-term interest rates and a depreciating US dollar contributed to a rebound in stocks for the fourth quarter. The S&P 500 gained 7.56% for the quarter but declined 18.11% for the year, while the Auxier Focus Fund Investor shares gained 11.21% and lost 4.52% for the full year.

title: Cigna Corporation Announces Appearance at the 43rd Annual Cowen Health Care Conference
text: BLOOMFIELD, Conn. , Feb. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Global health services company Cigna Corporation (NYSE:CI) announced today that Brian Evanko, executive vice president and chief financial officer, will present at the 43rd  Annual Cowen Health Care Conference on March 6, 2023 in Boston, MA.

title: Cequence Security Enhances API Security Testing Capabilities
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Cequence Security, the leading provider of Unified API Protection, today announced it has enhanced the testing capabilities within its Unified API Protection Platform with the availability of API Security Testing. This API Security Testing framework encourages shift-left efforts by giving security and development teams the tools to quickly uncover and remediate API vulnerabilities in pre-production environments that could otherwise lead to business disruption in production. To learn more about the new testing capabilities, request a demo here.

title: Cigna (CI) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: Cigna stock bounces after profit tops expectations, while revenue comes up shy
text: Shares of Cigna Corp. CI, -3.75% bounced 1.1% in premarket trading Friday, after closing the previous session at a 3 1/2-month low, after the health insurer reported fourth-quarter profit that topped expectations, while revenue came up a bit shy. Net income rose to $1.17 billion, or $3.83 a share, from $1.12 billion, or $3.39 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Cigna Reports Strong Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results, Establishes 2023 Guidance and Increases Dividend
text: Total revenues for 2022 were $180.5 billion Shareholders' net income for 2022 was $6.7 billion, or $21.30 per share Adjusted income from operations1 for 2022 was $7.3 billion, or $23.27 per share Adjusted income from operations1,2 is projected to be at least $7.33 billion in 2023, or at least $24.60 per share2 Board of Directors declared a 10% increase in the quarterly dividend rate, to $1.23 per share BLOOMFIELD, Conn. , Feb. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Global health services company Cigna Corporation (NYSE: CI) today reported strong 2022 results reflecting growth in both Evernorth and Cigna Healthcare.
